title: Parryable Projectiles
description: A datapack that makes all(with exceptions) projectile parryable, like the ghast fireball.
body:
# **Redirectables**

A datapack that allows you to redirect every projectiles, like how you redirect a ghast fireball and breeze's wind charge.

**Only available in the later versions**(Around 1.20ish), sorry:(

This datapack will allow you to **parry**:

<details>
<summary>All of the things you can reflect</summary>
  
- arrow
- spectral arrow
- fishing bobber
- blaze fireball
- egg
- snowball
- experience bottle
- llama spit
- enderpearl
- potions
- wiher skulls
- trident
- dragon fireball

</details>

**Check out the gallery if you are confused to what 'parry' means**

If you are wondering why things like shulker bullets aren't listed, it's beceause they are **not compatible with reflecting**, shulker bullets won't explode and it's pattern of flying is really strange.
